steps.expected: Page loads with changelog entries from GET /api/v1/changelog
steps.observed: Page loads successfully. GET /api/v1/changelog?page=0&size=50 returned HTTP 200 with { success: true, data: { content: [...], totalElements: 3, totalPages: 1, page: 0, size: 50 } }

steps.action: Verify entry cards display title, version badge, date, expand/collapse button
steps.expected: Each entry shows title, version badge, date, and View/Hide button
steps.observed: Three entry cards visible with titles ('Version 2.4.0 Major Update', 'Version 2.4.1 Hotfix', 'Version 2.5.0 Release'), version badges (2.4.0, 2.4.1, 2.5.0), dates, createdBy text, and 'View' expand buttons

steps.expected: Lock icon with read-only notice displayed
steps.observed: Read-only notice visible: 'Changelog entries are managed by the platform team. Contact your superadmin to publish or update entries.' with Lock icon

steps.action: Click 'View' button on 'Version 2.4.0 Major Update' entry
steps.expected: Body text expands, button changes to 'Hide'
steps.observed: Entry expanded successfully. Body text visible: '## New Features - Complete redesign of navigation sidebar - Added command palette (Ctrl+K) - Multi-company switching support ## Breaking Changes - Updated API authentication flow - Deprecated legacy /v1/users endpoint'. Button changed to 'Hide' with aria-expanded='true' and aria-label='Collapse entry'.

steps.expected: Body text collapses, button changes back to 'View'
steps.observed: Entry collapsed successfully. Body text no longer visible. Button changed back to 'View' with aria-label='Expand entry'.
Version 2.4.0 and 2.5.0 entries show 'Highlighted' badge (warning variant). Version 2.4.1 (isHighlighted=false) does not show the badge.

evidence.network: No additional network requests needed (client-side expand/collapse)

frictions.description: Backend had no changelog entries initially, so the page showed empty state ('No entries yet'). Had to create test entries via superadmin API (POST /api/v1/superadmin/changelog) to properly test both assertions. The validation admin account cannot create changelog entries (403 Access Denied).
frictions.resolution: Used superadmin credentials from .env.test (VALIDATION_SUPERADMIN_EMAIL/PASSWORD) to authenticate and create 3 test entries via curl/eval fetch. Cleaned up entries after testing.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: both passed. VAL-CLOG-001 confirmed changelog page loads with entry cards (title, version badge, date, expand/collapse), read-only notice, and clean GET /api/v1/changelog → 200. VAL-CLOG-002 confirmed expand/collapse works (View expands body text, Hide collapses it) and highlighted entries show 'Highlighted' badge. Note: required seeding test data via superadmin API as backend had no entries initially.
